commands.review_summary:
The PR adds five Vitest-backed QA scenario YAML entries for existing script tests and updates the QA Lab catalog test's expected native scenario list.

PR surface: Tests +10, Other +142. Total +152 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds QA scenario metadata rather than fixing a reported bug. The changed behavior is source-verifiable through the existing catalog, taxonomy, and native test-file runner path.

target.title: test: fold script coverage into QA scenarios
target.body:
## Summary
- add five QA Lab scenario YAML entries that fold script-backed coverage into the scenario/evidence inventory
- cover gateway smoke, channel message flow delivery, Docker package artifact generation, plugin lifecycle probe parsing, and QA OTEL smoke bounds
- update the QA scenario catalog test so native Vitest scenario entries are part of the expected non-flow set

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/gateway-smoke.test.ts test/scripts/channel-message-flows.test.ts test/scripts/package-openclaw-for-docker.test.ts test/scripts/plugin-lifecycle-probe.test.ts test/scripts/qa-otel-smoke.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm openclaw qa suite --scenario gateway-smoke --scenario channel-message-flows --scenario package-openclaw-for-docker --scenario plugin-lifecycle-probe --scenario qa-otel-smoke --output-dir .artifacts/qa-e2e/script-native-batch`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/test-file-scenario-runner.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-launch.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm openclaw qa coverage --json > .artifacts/qa-coverage-script-batch.json`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --prompt "Review the QA Lab script-to-scenario conversion batch after replacing ambiguous Telegram pairing and RTT mappings with channel-message-flows and qa-otel-smoke. Focus on scenario schema, taxonomy coverage IDs, QA evidence behavior, and whether the catalog test update is sufficient. Ignore generated artifacts under .artifacts and node_modules."`
target.author: romneyda
